name: seo-dungeon
description: SEO Dungeon skill suite with a gamified local audit UI. 25 sub-skills (21 core + 1 orchestrator + 1 framework integration + 2 extension mirrors), 18 sub-agents, and 23 Codex agent profiles backed by the v2.2 SEO engine.

interface.shortDescription: Run SEO Dungeon audits and SEO workflows in Codex.
interface.longDescription: SEO Dungeon is a gamified SEO analysis suite with Codex-compatible skills, Codex agent profiles, portable agent prompts, shared cache artifacts, optional SEO data integrations, and a dungeon crawler UI.
defaultPrompt: Audit this website for SEO issues.
Check schema and Core Web Vitals for this URL.
Build an SEO action plan for this business.
